'''jaluvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphectomy|nymphectomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphectomy|nymphectomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaluvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jælivith || jælivij || jælivish || jælivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jaluluvuth || jaluluvuj || jaluluvush || jaluluvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jaluvuth || jaluvuj || jaluvush || jaluvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jalufvufth || jalufvufj || jalufvufsh || jalufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jaluvuthu || jaluvuju || jaluvushu || jaluvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || jaluvuth || jaluvuj || jaluvush || jaluvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jaluvuthul || jaluvujul || jaluvushul || jaluvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jaluvuuthuthu || jaluvuujuju || jaluvuushushu || jaluvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || jaluvuthun || jaluvujun || jaluvushun || jaluvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jaluvuthuoro || jaluvujuoro || jaluvushuoro || jaluvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
